Canvas is EXACTLY 800x480 px, landscape, 1-bit. Render at deviceScaleFactor=1 (no retina upscale). Assert measured panel == 800x480 before accepting output.

Output must be pure #000 on #FFF. After hard-threshold (luminance>128 ? white : black) the grey-pixel count MUST be 0. No element may rely on grey, gradient, soft shadow, or anti-aliasing to be legible. Verified references produce 0 grey px (6.65% / 7.40% black ink).

Block snapshot until document.fonts.ready resolves AND both font families ('Frank Ruhl Libre' for quote+quote-mark, 'Heebo' for everything else) are confirmed loaded. If either family is missing, FAIL the render — do not fall back to a system serif (it changes line metrics and breaks the <=3-line guarantee).

Hero quote auto-fit is mandatory: pick start size by char-count tier (len<=90 ->46px / len<=160 ->36px / len>160 ->28px), then step font-size DOWN by 2px (line-height toward 1.3) while the quote wraps to MORE than 3 visual lines, stopping at the first size giving <=3 lines OR at the 28px floor. Never render the hero below 28px; flag over-long quotes for data trimming instead.

Keep the quote, divider, and attribution inside the centered safe box (top:100/104px, bottom:90/96px). The box is bounded above the footer and below the category/quote-mark band; assert the attribution's bottom edge never exceeds the footer's top edge and panel.scrollHeight<=480 / scrollWidth<=800 (zero overflow).

Fixed (never data-driven) chrome at exact coords: outer rule 3px inset 18px; inner rule 1px inset 26px; four 9x9 corner ticks inset 22px; divider = two 70x2 rules + 10px diamond; footer rules to 60px margins. Only the quote text, quote font-size, category value, speaker name, recipient name, chip initial, and date are variable.

Attribution must read RTL right->left as FROM speaker -> TO recipient: speaker cluster (outline chip + name, weight 700) on the RIGHT, left-pointing SVG arrow in the middle, recipient on the LEFT at weight 900 (heaviest mass on the card). Use the shared 3-column grid so role labels 'מאת'/'אל' sit centered over their columns; recipient must have white-space:nowrap and never wrap.

Chip initial = first letter of the speaker name; category tag value is one of חיבה / משפחה / מצחיק / מרגש (set from the quote's category); both hearts and the arrow are inline SVG with fill:none and stroke >= 2.4px so they survive the 1-bit threshold (only ticks, diamond, and rules are solid-black fills, all >= ~9px).

dir=rtl on <html> with lang=he; the arrow is the only direction-neutral SVG. Hebrew shaping, commas, and the quotation glyph must mirror natively — do not force any LTR override on the quote or names.
Add a CI gate that, for every generated card, runs the threshold proof and fails the build unless size==(800,480) AND grey_px==0 AND hero lines<=3 AND no element overflows the frame/footer.
